response.justification: The candidate presents extensive general software development experience, including valuable exposure to the Investment Banking domain and strong modern development practices like CI/CD. However, the resume critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of strong, hands-on C++ development experience on the Windows platform, showing only a brief period of C/C++ work almost a decade ago. This fundamental technical skill mismatch makes the candidate unsuitable for this specific C++ Developer role.
strengths: Over 10 years of professional software development experience.
Experience in the Investment Banking domain (RIDE Capital).
Proficiency in modern development practices like CI/CD and TDD.
concerns: Critically lacks the required 5-10 years of strong, hands-on C++ development experience.
C++ experience is minimal (6 months) and outdated (2014-2015), not recent or substantial.
No explicit strong SQL experience with SQL Server or Oracle mentioned.
